message:
mcp-server: RULAKE_ALLOWED_HOSTS env var for reverse-proxy deployments

Cloud Run / Fly / Render terminate TLS at the edge and forward with
the user-facing domain in the Host header. rmcp's DNS-rebinding guard
rejects unknown Host values with 403. Adding the cloud-run domain via
RULAKE_ALLOWED_HOSTS=foo.run.app fixes the deploy without weakening
the guard for plain bind targets.
